videos.title: 和你聊会儿｜曾沛慈：我花了很久，才找到自己
videos.author: 澎湃新闻
videos.description: 因参加一档热门综艺节目，曾沛慈再度回到大众视野。5月下旬，在节目录制的间隙，我在长沙见到了她。她说节目挑战远超预期，也提到曾被 “雷婷” 标签困扰。面对流量、年龄与感情，她坦言也曾有过迷茫与纠结，“我就是边跌倒边学习，花了很长时间，才找到自己。”

videos.title: Sharing your truth may just help others find theirs. #TEDTalks
videos.author: TED
videos.description: When fashion model Geena Rocero first saw a photo of herself in a bikini, "I thought ... you have arrived!" As she reveals, that's because she was born with the gender assignment "boy." In this moving talk, Rocero tells the story of becoming who she always knew she was.
